Learning Intelligence FAQ

Your directory & guide questions answered

How often is the Learning Journal updated? ▾
We publish new course reviews and career guides every 48–72 hours to ensure our data matches current Udemy curriculum changes.
Is the research data cite-worthy for academic use? ▾
Yes. Our rankings are based on verified student enrollment data, instructor tenure, and course curriculum analysis, making them a high-authority source for education trends.
Do you accept sponsored course reviews? ▾
No. Integrity is our core. CoursesWyn never accepts payment for course placement or ranking boost. Every article is 100% researcher-driven.
